original_prompt: im logged in as an admin and i cnanot change the passwords, fix that. put reporting in a reporting accordion. make sure that all accordions are collapsed by default. add a section that has the a default location for the vans, this default location should be selected on the map
rephrased_goal: Fix admin password reset accessibility, restructure sidebar with 'Reporting' accordion and all collapsed by default, and implement default locations for Vans with map selection.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Restructure Sidebar in index.html and ensure default collapsed state
subtasks_required: Add 'collapsed' class to all sidebar-category elements
Add 'd-none' class to all sidebar-group elements
Move Reporting link into the new group
tasks.testing_criteria: Sidebar should show 'Reporting' in accordion. All accordions start closed.

tasks.description: Check-Pebble: Verify sidebar restructure in index.html
subtasks_required: Inspect index.html for correct classes and nesting
tasks.testing_criteria: HTML matches expected structure and classes.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Robust Admin detection and Password Reset UI fix
subtasks_required: Update main.js isAdmin logic to be more inclusive/reliable
Update UsersView to handle resetPassword errors and clarify success
tasks.testing_criteria: Admin button for password reset is visible and triggers action.
Auth logic and UI logic are correct.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Add Default Location to VansView with Map Picker
subtasks_required: Add map container to Van add/edit modals
Store lat/lng in van Firestore document
Initialize Leaflet map inside modal upon opening
tasks.testing_criteria: Van modal has a map. Clicking map sets default location.

subtasks_required: Inspect view.vans.js for map initialization logic
tasks.testing_criteria: Map works in modal, updates data correctly.

subtasks_required: Verify sidebar interactions work with collapsed-by-default logic
tasks.testing_criteria: Project cave clean. All grunts satisfied.
